case_title: GILLIAN MARY BAZE VS. MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAZE, GILLIAN MARY AS TO DEFENDANT KIISK, DDS, INC, MAT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,723.00 FILED BY BAZE, GILLIAN MARY AS TO DEFENDANT BERDICHEVSKY, MIKHAIL DR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD. AMENDED SC-100 SENT CERTIFIED MAIL TO JEFF TIRET. INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-13-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GILLIAN MARY BAZE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATT KIISK DDS, INC IS NOT PRESENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED ON DEFENDANT MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MATT KIISK DDS, INC, NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KIISK, DDS, INC, MAT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF GILLIAN MARY BAZE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIISK, DDS, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MAT KIISK, PRESIDENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON KIISK DDS, INC. DEFENDANT KIIST DDS, INC WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-11-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM NAMING MATT KIISK DDS INC. AS A DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO MATT KIISK DDS INC. ADDITIONAL PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY (DR. B) IS NOT REQUIRED. PLAINTIFF GILLIAN MARY BAZE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: ADDITION OF 2ND DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAZE, GILLIAN MARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAZE, GILLIAN MARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BERDICHEVSKY, MIKHAIL DR. KIISK, DDS, INC, MAT CASES AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS DR. BERDICHEVSKY AND DR. KIISK ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS BY CLERK WINNY. SERVED JAN-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BERDICHEVSKY, MIKHAIL DR.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,723.00 **ADDING 2ND DEFENDANT** FILED BY BAZE, GILLIAN MARY AS TO DEFENDANT KIISK, DDS, INC, MAT
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE: STEVE REID) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAZE, GILLIAN MARY AS TO DEFENDANT KIISK, DDS, INC, MAT
